                                                          i 
                                                       
                                                    
                                                 
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       
                                                          p 
                                                       
                                                       
                                                          i 
                                                       
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                              , 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        (A.6) 
                                        
                                           
                                              = 
                                              
                                                 
                                                    ∑ 
                                                 
                                                 
                                                    i 
                                                    = 
                                                    1 
                                                 
                                                 
                                                    n 
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    1 
                                                    − 
                                                    
                                                       
                                                          p 
                                                       
                                                       
                                                          i 
                                                       
                                                    
                                                    − 
                                                    
                                                       
                                                          ε 
                                                       
                                                       
                                                          i 
                                                       
                                                    
                                                 
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       
                                                          p 
                                                       
                                                       
                                                          i 
                                                       
                                                    
                                                    + 
                                                    
                                                       
                                                          ε 
                                                       
                                                       
                                                          i 
                                                       
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                              . 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                Note that  (A.5)  is always true; whereas  (A.6)  is true because of the assumption that the point  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           1 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     … 
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           n 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                is observationally equivalent to  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     … 
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           n 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                               . Subtracting  (A.6)  from  (A.5)  and simplifying yields  
                                  
                                     (A.7) 
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 ∑ 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                                 = 
                                                 1 
                                              
                                              
                                                 n 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       ε 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       i 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       p 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       i 
                                                    
                                                 
                                                 
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       p 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       i 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       ∗ 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           = 
                                           0 
                                           
                                           . 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               Let us define the following:  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              T 
                                              ≔ 
                                              
                                                 
                                                    ∑ 
                                                 
                                                 
                                                    i 
                                                    = 
                                                    1 
                                                 
                                                 
                                                    n 
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    1 
                                                 
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       
                                                          p 
                                                       
                                                       
                                                          i 
                                                       
                                                    
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       
                                                          p 
                                                       
                                                       
                                                          i 
                                                       
                                                       
                                                          ∗ 
                                                       
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                              , 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    ω 
                                                 
                                                 
                                                    i 
                                                 
                                                 
                                                    † 
                                                 
                                              
                                              ≔ 
                                              
                                                 
                                                    1 
                                                 
                                                 
                                                    T 
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    1 
                                                 
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       
                                                          p 
                                                       
                                                       
                                                          i 
                                                       
                                                    
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       
                                                          p 
                                                       
                                                       
                                                          i 
                                                       
                                                       
                                                          ∗ 
                                                       
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                              . 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                Multiplying  (A.7)  by  
                                  
                                     
                                        1 
                                     
                                     
                                        T 
                                     
                                  
                                yields  
                                  
                                     (A.8) 
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 ∑ 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                                 = 
                                                 1 
                                              
                                              
                                                 n 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 ω 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                              
                                              
                                                 † 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 ε 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                           = 
                                           0 
                                           
                                           . 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               The  
                                  
                                     
                                        ω 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                     
                                        † 
                                     
                                  
                                values sum to  
                                  1 
                               , so  (A.8)  establishes that the  
                                  
                                     
                                        ω 
                                     
                                     
                                        † 
                                     
                                  
                               -weighted mean of the  
                                  
                                     
                                        ε 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                values is  
                                  0 
                               . Since the same set of  
                                  
                                     
                                        ε 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                is in both  (A.4) and (A.8) , there are only a few cases where both of these equations can be true because there cannot be different weightings of nonzero values that have the same mean. One solution is the case where  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           ε 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     0 
                                  
                                for all  
                                  i 
                               . But this case implies that  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               , for all  
                                  i 
                               , which means that the two points are equivalent. So, this case is not a demonstration of different points that are observationally equivalent. The second possible solution is the case where  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           ω 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           ω 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                        
                                           † 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                for all  
                                  i 
                               . This constraint results in the conclusion that  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     1 
                                     − 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                for all  
                                  i 
                               . Hence the point  
                                  
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              1 
                                           
                                           
                                              ∗ 
                                           
                                        
                                        , 
                                        … 
                                        , 
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              n 
                                           
                                           
                                              ∗ 
                                           
                                        
                                        ) 
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        1 
                                        − 
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              1 
                                           
                                        
                                        , 
                                        … 
                                        , 
                                        1 
                                        − 
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              n 
                                           
                                        
                                        ) 
                                     
                                  
                               . Yet for all  
                                  n 
                               , we have that  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           P 
                                        
                                        
                                           n 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        n 
                                        ) 
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           ∏ 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                           = 
                                           1 
                                        
                                        
                                           n 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               . Thus for the point  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           1 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     … 
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           n 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                to have the same likelihood, it is required that  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           ∏ 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                           = 
                                           1 
                                        
                                        
                                           n 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           ∏ 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                           = 
                                           1 
                                        
                                        
                                           n 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        1 
                                        − 
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                        ) 
                                     
                                  
                               . This last condition cannot be true in general, but it can be true in the special case that the distribution of the  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                values is symmetric; that is  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           2 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           3 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     … 
                                     , 
                                     1 
                                     − 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           3 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                     1 
                                     − 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           2 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                     1 
                                     − 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                               . Thus,  
                                  
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              1 
                                           
                                           
                                              ∗ 
                                           
                                        
                                        , 
                                        … 
                                        , 
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              n 
                                           
                                           
                                              ∗ 
                                           
                                        
                                        ) 
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        1 
                                        − 
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              1 
                                           
                                        
                                        , 
                                        
                                        1 
                                        − 
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              2 
                                           
                                        
                                        , 
                                        
                                        1 
                                        − 
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              3 
                                           
                                        
                                        , 
                                        
                                        … 
                                        
                                        , 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              3 
                                           
                                        
                                        , 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              2 
                                           
                                        
                                        , 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              1 
                                           
                                        
                                        ) 
                                     
                                  
                               , but this result shows that the point  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           1 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     … 
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           n 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                has the same standardized form as  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                     … 
                                     , 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           n 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                               . Consequently, there cannot be observationally equivalent model-space points in standardized form. □
